privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated HospitalRun visit data dynamically injected via setup_task.sh. The expected output file path (/home/ga/Desktop/admissions_report.png) and minimum file size threshold (10KB) strictly match the export scripts and verifier.py logic. The requested report type, start date, and end date directly match the explicit instructions in the task description.
